title: Contradiction audit: trigger claims done, context shows missing work; both must appear in context_checked
predicted_basis: structural invariant per spec FR-007; current classifier stops at the first keyword match and does not report every consulted item in context_checked
failure_mode: context_checked omits a consulted item: classifier stops at the first match instead of naming both trigger:done-claim-trig and context:ctx-open-subtask (FR-007)
invariant: audit field reflects every consulted item
rationale: The trigger and the single context item disagree (done-claim vs. open subtask), so a trustworthy verdict must have consulted both — context_checked must name both trigger:done-claim-trig and context:ctx-open-subtask (invariants.check_context_checked_completeness). FR-007 leaves the exact verdict open but the contradiction rules out PASS: missing work remains.
